overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a wizard character in robes and pointed hat walking through the Scottish countryside toward Hogsmeade village. The character passes a wooden cart and directional signpost, crosses a stone bridge, and enters the village through an ornate timber-framed archway before pausing to admire a scenic valley view.

scene_state.functional_zone: countryside path with distant castle view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a cobblestone path away from a wooden cart, with Hogwarts castle visible in the misty background

entered.detail: large gothic castle with multiple spires visible through the morning mist
wooden wagon with large wheels parked on the side of the path
low stone wall running alongside the cobblestone path
tall evergreen trees lining the countryside path

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a cobblestone country path, leaving a wooden cart behind. Hogwarts castle looms in the distant mist while a stone wall runs along the right side of the path.

events.description: approaching a large wooden signpost with multiple directional signs hanging from chains

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path and passing a prominent wooden signpost with hanging directional signs pointing to various locations

notable_agents.action: villager in white clothing walking in the opposite direction along the path

entered.detail: elaborate wooden signpost with multiple suspended directional signs and copper pots
tree with pink blossoms visible along the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes an ornate wooden signpost with hanging signs. A villager walks past in the opposite direction, and pink blossoming trees become visible along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: village high street approaching timber-framed entrance

events.description: approaching the stone bridge leading to the Hogsmeade village entrance archway

agents.ego_description: walking toward the village entrance, passing other villagers and approaching a stone bridge with timber-framed buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: villager walking ahead toward the village entrance

entered.detail: large timber-framed archway entrance to the village with steep gabled roof
cobblestone bridge with stone parapets crossing a small waterway
black iron street lamps on stone pillars flanking the bridge approach

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the village entrance, crossing a stone bridge flanked by iron lanterns. The large timber-framed Hogsmeade archway looms ahead, and other villagers walk toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered timber archway entrance to Hogsmeade

events.description: crossing the stone bridge and entering the covered wooden archway
character slows and turns to the right to look over the stone parapet wall

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge and walking under the timber-framed archway entrance to Hogsmeade, then pausing to look over the side wall

notable_agents.action: villager in dark robes walking alongside the character toward the village

entered.detail: red banner with gold hog emblem and 'Hogsmeade' text hanging from the archway
intricate wooden beam framework forming the covered entrance
thick stone wall with moss and vegetation growing at its base

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the bridge and enters the covered timber archway of Hogsmeade, passing under the red village banner. The character then turns to look over the stone parapet wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook with stream and mountain view

events.description: turning to overlook a scenic valley with a stream, waterfall, and distant mountains

agents.ego_description: standing at the stone wall looking out over a scenic valley with a flowing stream, waterfall, and distant mountains

notable_agents.action: villager standing at the wall looking at the scenic view

entered.detail: water flowing through rocky terrain in the valley below
small waterfall cascading down rocks in the stream
misty mountain peaks visible in the background
green valley with terraced grass and scattered trees

segments.scene_description: The character pauses to admire the scenic view from the bridge, overlooking a lush green valley with a flowing stream and waterfall. Distant mountains rise in the background, and another villager stands nearby enjoying the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning through the covered timber archway into Hogsmeade

events.description: turning back from the scenic view and walking toward the village entrance

agents.ego_description: turning away from the scenic overlook and walking back through the timber-framed archway into the village proper

notable_agents.action: villager in green clothing walking out of the village through the archway

entered.detail: cobblestone street leading into the village with timber buildings visible beyond the arch

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the scenic valley and walks back through the timber-framed archway into Hogsmeade village. The character passes a villager exiting the village as they enter the covered entranceway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty country path into the heart of Hogsmeade village, transitioning from a lonely rural road to a bustling scenic overlook. It begins with the character walking away from a wooden cart along a cobblestone path, with Hogwarts castle looming in the distant mist behind a stone wall. As the character passes an ornate wooden signpost and pink blossoming trees, the path opens up toward the village entrance, leading across a stone bridge flanked by iron lanterns. The scene then shifts as the character passes under a red banner within a large timber-framed archway before pausing at the stone parapet to admire a lush green valley featuring a flowing stream and distant mountains. Finally, the camera turns away from the vista, following the character as they walk back through the covered entrance and into the village.
